title: AI Engineer
description: We are looking for an AI Engineer to join our team. You will work on NLP, knowledge graphs, and LLM-based applications. Requirements: Python, PyTorch, experience with RAG systems. German B1+ preferred.

title: Machine Learning Researcher
description: Research position in causal machine learning. PhD preferred. Work on causal discovery, Bayesian networks, and knowledge graph integration. Publications track record required.

title: Frontend Developer
description: React/TypeScript frontend developer for e-commerce platform. 3+ years experience with React, Redux, and modern CSS.
